Unit Converter

Instant conversions across 12 categories — from length to fuel economy — with map-and-survey extras like chains, US survey feet, nautical miles and NATO mils. Everything runs in your browser.

To Result · click to copy

All units

your value in every unit of this category — click any card to copy
Tip: paces accept M:SS (e.g. 6:30) and decimals accept commas (3,5) · nothing you enter leaves this page · a max tool
